_doc: Per-sample texture metrics (DDI, χ_min) for page9. Round 1 ships an empty stub — page9 detects hasTexture() === false and renders the 'data pending' card. Populate by running phase_2_discovery/04_window_H_and_DDI.sh in catfish-diversity-analysis (to-be-written) and re-emitting this file with per_sample[], cohort_summary, windows{}, and per_sample_H_w{} per the schema in pages/per_sample/page9.html.

params.h_proxy: tP / nSites per window from per-sample ANGSD pestPG
